title: kts-system
description:
Client bank system for minecraft servers

Client side mod for create ecosystem on private minecraft servers
body:
This is client side mod for usage any people from server Haku/Sp/Spm and other supported minecraft private servers.

This mod added commands for control your kts-system account:
- create bank accounts
- pay from account1 to account2 with message
- buy items in boxes(see example on screenshoots)

Mod commands:
- /kts agent login <token> - login in kts-system system(login send discord bot from target message).
- /kts agent info - information about you.
- /kts agent info <agent_id> - information about other agent by id.
- /kts account create <account_name> <currency_id> - create wallet account in kts-system.
- /kts account info - all information about accounts in system.
- /kts account emission <account_id> <count> - emission money on wallet.
- /kts account freeze <account_id> <count> - freeze money on wallet.
- /kts account pay <account_from_id> <account_to_id> <count> - pay some money from account_from to account_to
- /kts account logs <account_id> - account logs.

This mod use thrift for connect to my remote server kts-system.
For use this mod you need register on server Haku/Sp/Spm and write me target message(if you want to use this mod).

If you don't registered on Haku/Sp/Spm, registration in kts-system not produced.
